title: Emotion Classification
description: A Python-powered machine learning model that is trained on a dataset of facial images labeled with emotions, enabling it to classify the emotion expressed in a new image.

title: Discord Git Push-Viewer
description: A Node.js bot that monitors a GitHub repository for pull request activity and sends real-time Discord notifications. Posts an embed when a PR is opened, then replaces it with a merge or close notification when the PR is resolved. State is persisted with Upstash Redis so no PR gets double-notified across restarts.

title: Schedule Optimizer
description: Production schedule optimizer for Kimberly-Clark manufacturing lines, using a genetic algorithm to minimize downtime and meet demand across tissue machines and converting lines.

title: Portfolio Site
description: Modern portfolio website with smooth animations and responsive design.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-stack online shopping platform with payment integration and inventory management.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: Real-time weather tracking application with interactive maps and forecasts.

title: Task Manager
description: Collaborative task management tool with team features and deadline tracking.
